description: 检测容器中的 SUID 文件、全局可写目录、/tmp 挂载安全标志（noexec）、渗透测试工具是否可访问、系统日志文件是否含敏感数据，以及已安装工具列表等软件层面的安全风险。

reportMetadata.remediationFocus: 移除不必要的 SUID 二进制、chmod o-w 全局可写目录、为 /tmp 添加 noexec 挂载标志、移除渗透测试工具；对日文文件设置严格权限；精简容器基础镜像避免携带编译器和脚本解释器。

envCheckCommands: which cat find mount grep test stat wc head command 2>/dev/null

executionLogic.expectedBehavior: 【判定硬规则】① SUID 文件数量多(>20)是常见容器情况，仅当发现 可写 SUID (-perm -4007) 时判 FAIL。② 全局可写目录存在=WARN(非必然FAIL)。③ /tmp 无 noexec=WARN。④ 渗透工具(john,hydra,nmap,sqlmap,socat,metasploit)=WARN(非FAIL)。⑤ 日志文件可读+含敏感词=WARN。⑥ gcc/g++/javac/go 等编译器存在=WARN(利于攻击者编译恶意代码)。⑦ 所有 find 命令的 'Permission denied' 是正常现象(PASS)，不影响判定。exit=127=工具不存在=PASS。
detectionCommands: mount 2>/dev/null | grep ' /tmp ' | head -2; echo 'TMP_MOUNT_FLAGS:'$(mount 2>/dev/null | grep ' /tmp ' | grep -o 'noexec\|nosuid\|nodev' | tr '\n' ' ')
for tool in john hydra nmap sqlmap socat; do command -v $tool 2>/dev/null && echo 'PENTOOL_FOUND:'$tool; done; echo 'PENTOOL_SCAN_DONE'
for tool in gcc g++ javac go python3 perl ruby; do command -v $tool 2>/dev/null && echo 'COMPILER_FOUND:'$tool; done; echo 'COMPILER_SCAN_DONE'

for lf in /var/log/auth.log /var/log/secure /var/log/messages /var/log/syslog /var/log/cloud-init.log /var/log/boot.log; do test -r $lf && echo 'LOG_READABLE:'$lf && grep -qiE 'password|secret|token' $lf 2>/dev/null && echo 'LOG_SENSITIVE:'$lf; done; echo 'LOG_SCAN_DONE'
for tool in curl wget nc python3 python perl ruby php node; do command -v $tool 2>/dev/null && echo 'NET_TOOL_FOUND:'$tool; done; echo 'NET_TOOL_SCAN_DONE'

envCheckCommands: which cat find mount grep test stat wc 2>/dev/null

executionLogic.expectedBehavior: 判定规则同 Debian。Alpine 可能无 command -v（可用 which 替代），EVOLVE 时注意。BusyBox find 选项可能略有不同但核心语法一致。
detectionCommands: mount 2>/dev/null | grep ' /tmp ' | head -2; echo 'TMP_FLAGS:'$(mount 2>/dev/null | grep ' /tmp ' | grep -o 'noexec\|nosuid\|nodev' | tr '\n' ' ')
for tool in john hydra nmap sqlmap socat; do which $tool 2>/dev/null && echo 'PENTOOL:'$tool; done; echo 'PENTOOL_DONE'
for tool in gcc g++ go python3; do which $tool 2>/dev/null && echo 'COMPILER:'$tool; done; echo 'COMPILER_DONE'

for lf in /var/log/auth.log /var/log/messages /var/log/syslog; do test -r $lf && echo 'LOG_READABLE:'$lf && grep -qiE 'password|secret|token' $lf 2>/dev/null && echo 'LOG_SENSITIVE:'$lf; done; echo 'LOG_DONE'
for tool in curl wget nc python3 python php; do which $tool 2>/dev/null && echo 'NET_TOOL:'$tool; done; echo 'NET_TOOL_DONE'

executionLogic.expectedBehavior: Windows 容器中重点检查用户组权限、磁盘挂载状态和服务安全管理。net localgroup 和 Get-Service 是核心检测命令。
